metadata.title: Soulframe - All Items
metadata.description: Every item in Soulframe: weapons, armor, totems, motes, runes, blueprints, resources, materials, currencies, cosmetics, consumables, and more. Each entry includes the internal path, language key for localisation, crafting recipe reference, and required ingredients.
